generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "The permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "The cycloidal gearbox component of the first vertical axis transmission system"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor shaft for real-time rotational position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataStream
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox for reduced positional uncertainty measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataStream
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring electric energy input to the motor (I_M) converted to applied torque"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance CombinedSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderDataStream, SecondaryEncoderDataStream, CurrentSensorDataStream
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model (Simulation M) for motor simulation with friction effects (Coulomb-Viscous) to compute torque and angular velocity outputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance GearwheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model (SimModel GW) simulating gearwheel dynamics with friction-affected outputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance GearboxSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model (SimModel GB) implementing cycloidal gearbox friction simulation (Stribeck model)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance BaseFrictionlessModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink reference model of frictionless system (Fig. 4a) serving as baseline for friction comparison"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkProcessingFramework
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time torque measurements (τ_M, τ_G, τ_out) from encoder comparisons and current conversion"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CombinedSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CustomVisualizationDashboard
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time angular velocity measurements (ω) derived from encoder readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CombinedSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelRefinementService
]

instance MeasuredPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time position measurements (±90° working range) from encoder comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CombinedSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PositionAccuracyService
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque outputs (τ̂_M, τ̂_G, τ̂_out) generated by friction models for comparison"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream, CurrentSensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionComparisonService
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity outputs (ω̂) derived from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VelocityValidationService
]

instance FrictionModelParametersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Dynamic friction model parameters (Coulomb coefficient, viscous constant) updated during operation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataStream, MotorEncoderDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelRefinementService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:CommunicationProtocol [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming (input current, motor/gearbox outputs) from robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorDataStreamingService
]

instance SimulinkProcessingFramework : DTDFVocab:ProcessingFramework [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink environment for executing friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck) and processing data traces"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionSimulationService, ModelRefinementService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:ReferenceModel [
    base:desc "UML class diagram (DSRM) providing foundational traceability structure for linking data origins (sensor vs. model)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance CustomVisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:VisualizationTool [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard integrating measured vs. simulated data visualization for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance PositionAccuracyService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of motion accuracy deviations (up to 30% from friction) using encoder comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:provides PositionDeviationInsight
]

instance FrictionComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured vs. simulated torque/velocity data to detect friction-related discrepancies"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDiscrepancyInsight
]

instance VelocityValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Validation of angular velocity accuracy by comparing measured and simulated outputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides VelocityAccuracyInsight
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic updating of friction models during operation to adapt to wear, tool changes, or load variations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DataTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Semantic linking of data points to their computational origins (sensor vs. model) for diagnostics"
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityReportAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified interface for integrated visualization of measured vs. simulated data (torque, angular velocity)"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationReportAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction characteristics enabling adaptive control strategies"
]

instance PositionDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of motion inaccuracies (up to 30%) caused by friction affecting robot positioning"
]

instance FrictionDiscrepancyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of torque/velocity discrepancies between measured and simulated values highlighting friction effects"
]

instance VelocityAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of angular velocity accuracy through comparison of encoder-derived and model-predicted outputs"
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic updating of friction model parameters during operation to maintain accuracy with wear/load changes"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TraceabilityReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of diagnostic reports linking data origins for maintenance planning and tool optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VisualizationReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Creation of interactive dashboards showing real-time friction analysis and control recommendations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Asset Model
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisAsset : DTDFVocab:Asset [
    base:desc "The first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, gear transmission, and cycloidal gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, InputCurrentSensor
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment RobotOperationEnvironment
]

// C5: Environment
instance RobotOperationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxisAsset, SiemensSINUMERIKController, Max100WorkingRange
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller enabling separate control of position, speed, and acceleration for each axis"
]

instance Max100WorkingRange : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "±90° working range of the first vertical axis with maximum speed of 75°/s"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and adaptive**:
  - **Data acquisition frequency**: Sensor data (e.g., encoders, current) is streamed in **real-time** (implied by MQTT live updates) to support **continuous friction modeling**.
  - **Model update frequency**: Friction models are **dynamically refined** during operation, with updates triggered by **operational changes** (e.g., load variations, wear).
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are aligned with **physical system events** (e.g., robot movements) to ensure **coherent temporal correlation** between physical and virtual states."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is **single-axis focused** for the first robot axis but scalable:
  - **Core components**:
    - **Digital Shadow (DS)**: A **passive data aggregation layer** (one-way flow) linking physical sensors to simulation models (e.g., Fig. 5 UML diagram).
    - **Processing components**: **Simulation classes (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB)** that compute friction-affected outputs.
    - **Asset (Mabi)**: The **MABI MAX 100 robot’s first axis** (motor + gearbox).
  - **Interactions**:
    - **Data traces** (e.g., torque, angular velocity) are **semantically linked** to their sources (e.g., sensors, models) via metadata.
    - **No explicit virtual-to-physical interaction** is described; the focus is on **real-time data-driven friction modeling** for control accuracy improvement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across **three lifecycle stages**:
  1. **As designed**: Structural models (e.g., SysML Block Definition Diagram) describe the **ideal mechanical and electrical architecture** of the first axis.
  2. **As manufactured/operated**: Real-time data (e.g., sensor measurements) and **live friction models** are integrated to **correct inaccuracies** during operation.
  3. **Continuous refinement**: The digital shadow enables **on-the-fly model updates** to adapt to **wear, tool changes, or environmental factors** (e.g., temperature, load)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity considerations include:
  - **Model accuracy**:
    - **White-box models** (analytical) account for **load, temperature, and time-dependent friction effects** but require parameter tuning.
    - **Black-box models** (data-driven) eliminate parameter identification but may lack physical interpretability.
  - **Data validation**:
    - **Sensor redundancy**: Two encoders per axis reduce positional uncertainty by comparing **motor vs. secondary encoder readings**.
    - **Reference data**: Torque and angular velocity are **derived from measured inputs** (e.g., current) using robot-specific dynamics models.
  - **Uncertainty handling**:
    - **Real-time friction identification** relies on **continuous model updates** to mitigate drift due to wear or environmental changes.
    - **Visualization dashboard** highlights discrepancies between measured and simulated data for **diagnostic purposes**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin technical connection uses:
  - **Data transmission**: **MQTT protocol** for real-time streaming of sensor data (e.g., encoders, current) from the **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller** to the digital shadow system.
  - **Model integration**: **SysML models** (BDD/IBD) and **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for executable simulation of friction models.
  - **Traceability**: Data traces are **semantically linked** to their sources (e.g., sensor, model) via metadata, ensuring **end-to-end traceability** from physical to virtual."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: A **UML-based framework** (Fig. 1) for defining data traces, models, and metadata.
  - **Modeling standards**:
    - **SysML** for structural and behavioral modeling of the robot’s first axis.
    - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for executable simulation of friction models.
  - **Data protocols**: **MQTT** for real-time sensor data streaming (implied for interoperability)."
]
